title: indigofera zornioides
intro: Indigofera zornioides, also known as Zorn's indigo or Indigofera zornioides, is a plant species within the pea family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Indigofera zornioides include reducing swelling, combating bacterial infections, and alleviating pain. Indigofera zornioides is often used in herbal preparations such as tinctures, ointments, and salves to harness its medicinal properties for topical application.
